retrieved_result: Writing Your First VBA Function in Excel Writing Your First VBA Function in Excel About User Defined Functions Excel provides the user with a large collection of ready-made functions, more than enough to satisfy the average user. Many more can be added by installing the various add-ins that are available. Most calculations can be achieved
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page discusses VBA in Excel (an Excel VBA editor) and user-defined functions, not a list or discussion of top integrated development environments (IDEs) for general software development. It is tangential at best and does not address the query.
